original_draft.goal: Research a given topic and produce an ID-ready content brief with learning objectives, module outline, assessment plan, and curated resources — grounded in current industry standards and aligned to the ADDIE instructional design framework.
success_criteria: At least 5 authoritative sources retrieved from recognized professional bodies
All learning outcomes written using Bloom's Taxonomy verbs appropriate to the education level
Content brief includes module outline, objectives, assessment plan, and provenance-annotated resource list
All sources carry domain and retrieval date for audit traceability
constraints: Never fabricate sources — only cite URLs returned by Tavily search
All learning outcomes must reference specific competency standards from the accreditation context
Every module section must include a provenance block with source URLs and retrieval dates

nodes.name: Intake
nodes.description: Receive the research topic, target audience, education level, and accreditation context from the user. Confirm the scope before proceeding.
nodes.success_criteria: The user has confirmed the topic, audience, level, and accreditation context.

nodes.name: Domain Research
nodes.description: Search for current industry standards, regulatory requirements, and best practices using Tavily with domain-scoped queries.
nodes.success_criteria: At least 5 relevant sources have been found and saved.

nodes.name: Standards Alignment
nodes.description: Map research findings to specific learning outcomes and competency standards based on the audience level and accreditation requirements.
nodes.success_criteria: Research findings have been mapped to learning outcomes and competency standards.

nodes.name: ADDIE Synthesis
nodes.description: Apply the ADDIE instructional design framework to transform aligned standards into a structured module outline with objectives, content structure, and assessment types.
nodes.success_criteria: A complete ADDIE-structured curriculum outline has been created.

nodes.name: Content Brief
nodes.description: Generate and present the final ID-ready content brief to the user, including learning objectives, module outline, assessment plan, and curated resources.
nodes.success_criteria: A complete content brief has been presented to the user and saved as a file.
